Understanding NB Plc 2022 Performance & 2023 Outlook

L-R: Chukwuemeka Aniukwu, Head of Sustainability & Regulation Nigerian Breweries Plc and Odume Festus, Editorial / Project Director Financial Edge, at the Nigerian Breweries Plc review of 2022 performance and outlook for 2023 financial year in Lagos.
